meals.name: Breakfast
meals.recipe_title: Greek Yogurt with Berries and Almonds
instructions: Mix Greek yogurt and mixed berries in a bowl.
Top with almonds and serve.

swap_options.recipe_title: Cottage Cheese with Banana and Peanut Butter
instructions: Mix cottage cheese and sliced banana in a bowl.
Drizzle with peanut butter and serve.

meals.name: Lunch
meals.recipe_title: Egg White Omelette with Spinach and Feta
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add spinach and cook until wilted.
Pour in egg whites and cook until set.
Sprinkle feta on top and fold omelette before serving.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add chopped bell pepper and onion, sauté until soft.
Crumble tofu into the pan and cook until heated through.
Season with salt and pepper before serving.

meals.name: Snack
meals.recipe_title: Whey Protein Shake with Banana
instructions: Blend whey protein, banana, and milk until smooth.
Serve immediately.
Blend Greek yogurt, mixed berries, and honey until smooth.
Serve immediately.

meals.name: Dinner
meals.recipe_title: Cottage Cheese and Quinoa Salad
instructions: Cook quinoa as per package instructions and let it cool.
Mix cottage cheese, quinoa, and cherry tomatoes in a bowl.
Drizzle with olive oil before serving.
Boil eggs, peel and chop them.
Mix eggs, avocado, and lettuce in a bowl.
Drizzle with olive oil and serve.

meals.name: Breakfast
meals.recipe_title: Cottage Cheese with Pineapple and Almonds
instructions: Mix cottage cheese and pineapple in a bowl.
Top with almonds and serve.

swap_options.recipe_title: Greek Yogurt with Honey and Walnuts
instructions: Mix Greek yogurt and honey in a bowl.
Top with walnuts and serve.

meals.name: Lunch
meals.recipe_title: Egg White Scramble with Vegetables
instructions: Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add chopped bell pepper and onion, sauté until soft.
Pour in egg whites and cook until set.
Serve immediately.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add broccoli and stir-fry until tender.
Add tofu and soy sauce, cook until heated through.
Serve immediately.

meals.name: Snack
meals.recipe_title: Whey Protein Shake with Mixed Berries
instructions: Blend whey protein, mixed berries, and milk until smooth.
Serve immediately.
Blend Greek yogurt, banana, and honey until smooth.
Serve immediately.

meals.name: Dinner
meals.recipe_title: Quinoa and Black Bean Salad
instructions: Mix quinoa, black beans, and cherry tomatoes in a bowl.
Drizzle with olive oil and serve.
Scramble eggs and cook in a pan.
Place eggs and avocado in a tortilla, wrap and serve.
